tasks.label: scp-to-remote
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 BMP390; rm -f /tmp/BMP390' && scp build/BMP390 pavel@192.168.0.2:/tmp

tasks.label: run-remote-gdbserver
tasks.command: ssh pavel@192.168.0.2 'killall -q -9 gdbserver BMP390; nohup gdbserver :9091 /tmp/BMP390 > /dev/null 2>&1 &'
